description_long: This is a disposable paper coffee cup with a white body and a white plastic lid, commonly used for takeaway beverages. Around the middle of the cup is a brown cardboard sleeve featuring a prominent black logo and text, which serves as insulation for holding hot drinks. The cup displays printed branding and a stylized face logo, as well as some printed order information and QR code on the sleeve. The lid is slightly domed and fits snugly over the rim, with a small drinking spout visible. The cup appears to be empty or partially filled, and the bottom shows some wear or staining, typical of cups used in urban environments. The overall appearance is that of a standard branded coffee cup from a well-known coffee chain.
description: A white disposable coffee cup with a plastic lid and a brown branded cardboard sleeve, featuring a black logo and printed text.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with the cardboard sleeve's side, displaying part of the logo and some printed text.
description_view_1: The front of the cup prominently displays the stylized face logo on the brown sleeve.
description_view_2: This view shows the order information, QR code, and more text on the sleeve, with the lid's spout visible.
description_view_3: The back of the cup reveals additional printed text and the seam of the cardboard sleeve.
